---
title: "Risk Register"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("quarto-data/risk-register.json"), Path("../quarto-data/risk-register.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "quarto-data/risk-register.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report risk-register"
    )

d       = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group   = d["group"]
summary = d["summary"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
""")
```

## Summary

```{python}
roam = summary["roam"]
alerts = summary["alerts"]
vs_counts = summary["vs_counts"]

roam_html = '<table class="table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Status</th><th>All Issues</th><th>Linked to Epics</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
for r in roam:
    all_cell = f'<a href="{r["url"]}" target="_blank">{r["all"]}</a>' if r["all"] else "0"
    roam_html += f'<tr><td>{r["icon"]} {r["status"]}</td><td>{all_cell}</td><td>{r["linked"]}</td></tr>'
roam_html += f'<tr><td><strong>Total</strong></td><td><strong>{summary["total_all_roam"]}</strong></td><td><strong>{summary["total_linked"]}</strong></td></tr>'
roam_html += "</tbody></table>"

alert_rows = [
    ("🔒 Blocked",         alerts["blocked"]),
    ("📅 Child Overdue",   alerts["child_overdue"]),
    ("📅 Past Due",        alerts["past_due"]),
    ("⏱️ Behind Schedule", alerts["behind_schedule"]),
]
alert_html = ""
if any(v for _, v in alert_rows):
    alert_html = '<table class="table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Condition</th><th>Items</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
    for label, count in alert_rows:
        if count:
            alert_html += f"<tr><td>{label}</td><td>{count}</td></tr>"
    alert_html += "</tbody></table>"

vs_html = ""
if vs_counts:
    vs_html = '<table class="table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Value Stream</th><th>ROAM Risks</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
    for vs in vs_counts:
        vs_html += f"<tr><td>{vs['name']}</td><td>{vs['count']}</td></tr>"
    vs_html += "</tbody></table>"

panels = [
    ("<strong>ROAM Risk Issues</strong>", roam_html),
]
if alert_html:
    panels.append(("<strong>Condition Alerts</strong>", alert_html))
if vs_html:
    panels.append(("<strong>By Value Stream</strong>", vs_html))

cells = "".join(
    f"<td valign='top' style='padding-right:40px'>{title}<br>{body}</td>"
    for title, body in panels
)
HTML(f"<table><tr>{cells}</tr></table>")
```

## ⚠️ ROAM Risk Issues

```{python}
roam_rows = d["roam_rows"]
ROAM_ORDER  = ["roam::owned", "roam::accepted", "roam::mitigated", "roam::resolved"]
ROAM_LABELS = {"roam::owned": "⚠️ Owned", "roam::accepted": "✋ Accepted",
               "roam::mitigated": "🛡️ Mitigated", "roam::resolved": "✅ Resolved"}

has_any = any(roam_rows.get(lbl) for lbl in ROAM_ORDER)
if not has_any:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No ROAM risk issues found. Create issues with <code>roam::owned</code>, "
         "<code>roam::accepted</code>, <code>roam::mitigated</code>, or "
         "<code>roam::resolved</code> labels and link them to the threatened epic via "
         "<strong>\"relates to\"</strong>.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    for lbl in ROAM_ORDER:
        rows = roam_rows.get(lbl, [])
        if not rows:
            continue
        label = ROAM_LABELS[lbl]
        html += f"<h3>{label} ({len(rows)})</h3>"
        html += '<table class="table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Risk Issue</th><th>Assignee</th><th>Epics Threatened</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
        for row in rows:
            rlink   = f'<a href="{row["url"]}" target="_blank">{row["title"]}</a>' if row["url"] else row["title"]
            e_links = ", ".join(
                f'<a href="{e["url"]}" target="_blank">{e["title"]}</a>' if e["url"] else e["title"]
                for e in row["epics"]
            )
            html += f"<tr><td>{rlink}</td><td>{row['assignee']}</td><td>{e_links}</td></tr>"
        html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

## Condition Alerts

```{python}
def _render_epic_table(rows, header=""):
    if not rows:
        return ""
    html = header
    html += '<table class="table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Epic</th><th>PI</th><th>Group / ART</th><th>State</th><th>At Risk Reasons</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
    for row in rows:
        link = f'<a href="{row["url"]}" target="_blank">{row["icon"]} {row["title"]}</a>' if row["url"] else f'{row["icon"]} {row["title"]}'
        html += f"<tr><td>{link}</td><td>{row['piid']}</td><td>{row['path']}</td><td>{row['state']}</td><td>{row['reasons']}</td></tr>"
    html += "</tbody></table>"
    return html

sections = [
    (d["blocked"],         "🔒 Blocked",          "_Has one or more active blocking relationships._"),
    (d["child_overdue"],   "📅 Child Overdue",     "_A child Feature has passed its due date and is not Closed._"),
    (d["past_due"],        "📅 Past Due",          "_The epic's own due date has passed and it is not Closed._"),
    (d["behind_schedule"], "⏱️ Behind Schedule",   "_Open in an active PI with % complete below % of PI elapsed._"),
]

html = ""
for rows, title, note in sections:
    if rows:
        html += f"<h3>{title} ({len(rows)})</h3><p><em>{note}</em></p>"
        html += _render_epic_table(rows)

if not html:
    html = "<p>✅ No condition alerts.</p>"

HTML(html)
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

| Icon | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| ⚠️ Owned | Someone owns this risk and is actively managing it |
| ✋ Accepted | Risk acknowledged; no action planned |
| 🛡️ Mitigated | Steps taken to reduce probability or impact |
| ✅ Resolved | Risk eliminated — close or remove the issue |
| 🔒 Blocked | Item has one or more active blocking relationships |
| 📅 Past Due | Item's due date has passed and it is not Closed |
| 📅 Child Overdue | A child Feature has passed its due date and is not Closed |
| ⏱️ Behind Schedule | Active PI: % Done is less than % of PI elapsed |
:::
